channel.title: Artometrics Reports
channel.description: Data reports on culture, power, and the creative economy

item.title: AWARDS PRESTIGE ECONOMY: Oscars, Grammys, Nobels
item.description: A cross-medium report on how award systems convert attention into legitimacy across film, music, literature, science, and public culture.

item.title: CALIFORNIA VS TEXAS: The Artometrics of Rival State Systems
item.description: A comparative geo-economics report on why California and Texas are paired in public debate, what they share, and where their economies, exports, risks, and identities diverge.

item.title: CELTICS: The Artometrics of Institutional Winning
item.description: The Celtics are basketball's clearest example of inherited expectation: a franchise whose 1960s dominance still shapes every modern season.

item.title: CITY BIOECONOMICS: The Urban Operating System
item.description: A geo-economics framework for analyzing cities as layered systems of exports, services, culture, scarcity, infrastructure, and historical identity.

item.title: COWBOYS: The Artometrics of America's Team
item.description: The Dallas Cowboys are the NFL's clearest separation between brand value and postseason conversion: a global sports machine with an old championship engine.

item.title: CULTURAL EXPORTS: The Geo-Economics of Soft Power
item.description: A cultural economics report framing films, music, games, food, fashion, and media as exports that shape national and city identity.

item.title: DODGERS: The Artometrics of Baseball's Modern Machine
item.description: The Dodgers are baseball's modern consistency machine: a franchise that turned money, development, and depth into recurring October access.

item.title: EXPORT SUPERPOWERS: United States, China, Germany
item.description: A comparative country report on why the U.S., China, and Germany are discussed together, and how their export systems differ by platforms, factories, machinery, dependencies, and replaceability.

item.title: IMDb BLOCKBUSTER GRAMMAR: The Artometrics of Movie Fame
item.description: A film-culture report using IMDb-style public title fields, rating logic, and box-office references to explain how movies become famous.

item.title: LAKERS: The Artometrics of Basketball Glamour
item.description: The Lakers are basketball's glamour machine: a franchise that converts stars, market gravity, and expectation into recurring championship eras.

item.title: LEAGUE MONEY, SKILL, AND STAR SYSTEMS
item.description: A cross-sport report on how league rules, money, roster scale, event scarcity, and cultural reach shape the way teams become meaningful.

item.title: MUSICBRAINZ: The Artometrics of Pop Fame
item.description: A music-culture report using MusicBrainz-style metadata to explain how artists become famous through catalog depth, format shifts, genre travel, and reinvention.

item.title: NATIONAL EXPORT IDENTITY ATLAS
item.description: A country-level geo-economics report framing exports as identity: what nations sell, what they need, what competitors can replace, and what products carry prestige.

item.title: NEW YORK VS SAN FRANCISCO: Command City and Invention City
item.description: A comparative city report asking why New York and San Francisco are discussed together, what they share, and where their economic and cultural systems diverge.

item.title: PANTHEON: The Artometrics of Collective Memory
item.description: A cultural data report using Pantheon-style biography data to ask who gets remembered, where memory clusters, and how fame travels across language, era, and institution.

item.title: PATRIOTS: The Artometrics of the System Dynasty
item.description: The Patriots are the NFL's great system shock: a franchise whose Brady/Belichick era compressed a century of legacy into two decades.

item.title: PROJECT GUTENBERG: The Artometrics of the Public-Domain Canon
item.description: A literary culture report using Project Gutenberg metadata logic to map language gravity, era effects, author memory, adaptation power, and remix value.

item.title: REGIONAL SPORTS IDENTITY MAP
item.description: A cross-report map of how regions, markets, leagues, and droughts create different sports identities across American cities.

item.title: SAN FRANCISCO DATA MICROSCOPE: The City as an Invention Machine
item.description: A city-identity report framing San Francisco through software exports, housing pressure, neighborhood signals, competitors, and open civic questions.

item.title: SPORTS DYNASTY INDEX: Best, Worst, and Most Misleading Teams
item.description: A cross-league Artometrics report comparing championship mass, conversion, market value, parity, and fan pain across major sports franchises.

item.title: YANKEES: The Artometrics of Baseball's Empire
item.description: The Yankees are not merely baseball's most decorated franchise. They are the sport's benchmark for expectation, drought, payroll pressure, and historical scale.

item.title: AIRLINE SAFETY: The Artometrics of Airline Safety
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2018-08-07 release on Airline Safety — 336 rows after cleaning and merge. Which carriers show the worst safety records in this extract?

item.title: ALCOHOL CONSUMPTION: The Artometrics of Alcohol Consumption
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2018-06-26 release on Alcohol Consumption — 193 rows after cleaning and merge. Who drinks the most per capita — and how did consumption move?

item.title: ALL THE PIZZA: The Artometrics of All The Pizza
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2019-10-01 release on All The Pizza — 10,000 rows after cleaning and merge. What does pizza cost — and what do you pay in calories?

item.title: BEYONCÉ & TAYLOR SWIFT LYRICS: The Artometrics of Beyoncé & Taylor Swift Lyrics
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2020-09-29 release on Beyoncé & Taylor Swift Lyrics — 22,616 rows after cleaning and merge. How do two era-defining catalogs compare line by line?

item.title: BIG MAC INDEX: The Artometrics of Purchasing Power
item.description: A Big Mac costs $8.31 in Switzerland and under $2 in parts of Asia. Twenty years of price data reveal how currency, wages, and exchange rates shape the cost of a burger — and a lot more.

item.title: BIKETOWN BIKESHARE: The Artometrics of Biketown Bikeshare
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2018-06-05 release on Biketown Bikeshare — 100,000 rows after cleaning and merge. How long and far do Portland Biketown trips run?

item.title: BILLBOARD HOT 100: The Artometrics of Number-One Domination
item.description: Since 1958 the Hot 100 has crowned 1,177 number-one songs. Most lasted two weeks. A few held the top for months. This report counts who dominated, when the longest runs happened, and what has changed since streaming rewrote the rules.

item.title: BILLBOARD TOP 100: The Artometrics of Billboard Top 100
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2021-09-14 release on Billboard Top 100 — 100,000 rows after cleaning and merge. How did chart positions compress at the top of the Hot 100?

item.title: BOARD GAMES: The Artometrics of Board Games
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2019-03-12 release on Board Games — 10,532 rows after cleaning and merge. Which board games combine crowd scale with elite ratings?

item.title: BROADWAY MUSICALS: The Artometrics of Broadway Musicals
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2020-04-28 release on Broadway Musicals — 47,524 rows after cleaning and merge. Which musicals ran longest and grossed hardest on Broadway?

item.title: CEO DEPARTURES: The Artometrics of CEO Departures
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2021-04-27 release on CEO Departures — 9,423 rows after cleaning and merge. How long do CEOs last before departure — and how do exits cluster?

item.title: CETACEANS: The Artometrics of Cetaceans
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2018-12-18 release on Cetaceans — 2,194 rows after cleaning and merge. How do cetacean sizes cluster by family — and who are the giants?

item.title: CHRISTMAS NOVELS: The Artometrics of Christmas Novels
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2025-12-30 release on Christmas Novels — 35 rows after cleaning and merge. Which Christmas novels and authors anchor the Gutenberg holiday shelf?

item.title: CHRISTMAS SONGS: The Artometrics of Christmas Songs
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2019-12-24 release on Christmas Songs — 387 rows after cleaning and merge. Which holiday standards refuse to leave the chart?

item.title: CIA WORLD FACTBOOK: The Artometrics of CIA World Factbook
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2024-10-22 release on CIA World Factbook — 259 rows after cleaning and merge. How do population scale and prosperity relate across countries?

item.title: COLLEGE MAJOR & INCOME: The Artometrics of College Major & Income
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2018-10-16 release on College Major & Income — 173 rows after cleaning and merge. Which majors pay most — and which carry unemployment risk?

item.title: COMIC BOOK CHARACTERS: The Artometrics of Comic Book Characters
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2018-05-29 release on Comic Book Characters — 23,272 rows after cleaning and merge. Who ranks highest on the power scale — and does size matter?

item.title: CRAFT BEER USA: The Artometrics of Craft Beer USA
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2018-07-10 release on Craft Beer USA — 2,410 rows after cleaning and merge. How bitter and strong is American craft beer — by state and brewery?

item.title: EMMY AWARDS: The Artometrics of Emmy Awards
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2021-09-21 release on Emmy Awards — 29,678 rows after cleaning and merge. Which shows dominated Emmy season and how lopsided was the hardware?

item.title: EXERCISE USA: The Artometrics of Exercise USA
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2018-07-17 release on Exercise USA — 52 rows after cleaning and merge. Which states exercise most — and how did activity rates shift?

item.title: FAST FOOD CALORIES: The Artometrics of Fast Food Calories
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2018-09-04 release on Fast Food Calories — 515 rows after cleaning and merge. Which chains pack the most calories per item?

item.title: GLOBAL LIFE EXPECTANCY: How Humanity Doubled Its Lifespan in 500 Years
item.description: In 1543 the median human life lasted roughly 30 years. By 2015 it had climbed past 73. This report maps five centuries of survival data — who leads, who lags, and why the gap between them has never been wider.

item.title: GLOBAL PLASTIC WASTE: The Artometrics of Global Plastic Waste
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2019-05-21 release on Global Plastic Waste — 22,204 rows after cleaning and merge. Who generates the most plastic waste — and how much goes mismanaged?

item.title: HORROR MOVIE PROFIT: The Artometrics of Horror Movie Profit
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2018-10-23 release on Horror Movie Profit — 3,401 rows after cleaning and merge. Which horror bets returned multiples and which franchises burned cash?

item.title: HORROR MOVIES: The Artometrics of Horror Movies
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2022-11-01 release on Horror Movies — 32,540 rows after cleaning and merge. Did horror get better-reviewed as the catalog exploded, or did quantity...

item.title: HURRICANES & PUERTO RICO: The Artometrics of Hurricanes & Puerto Rico
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2018-06-19 release on Hurricanes & Puerto Rico — 153 rows after cleaning and merge. Which storms hit hardest — wind, deaths, and frequency over time?

item.title: HYDRO WASTEWATER PLANTS: The Artometrics of Hydro Wastewater Plants
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2022-09-20 release on Hydro Wastewater Plants — 58,502 rows after cleaning and merge. Where do wastewater plants serve the most people — and discharge...

item.title: INCARCERATION TRENDS: The Artometrics of Incarceration Trends
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2019-01-22 release on Incarceration Trends — 100,000 rows after cleaning and merge. How did incarceration rates trend — and which states diverged?

item.title: LANGUAGES OF THE WORLD: The Artometrics of Languages of the World
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2025-12-23 release on Languages of the World — 8,612 rows after cleaning and merge. How concentrated is human linguistic diversity at the family level?

item.title: LEGO DATABASE: The Artometrics of LEGO Database
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2022-09-06 release on LEGO Database — 19,798 rows after cleaning and merge. How did LEGO set complexity evolve across themes?

item.title: MEDIUM ARTICLE METADATA: The Artometrics of Medium Article Metadata
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2018-12-04 release on Medium Article Metadata — 78,388 rows after cleaning and merge. Did longer Medium posts earn more applause?

item.title: NATIONAL PARK VISITS: The Artometrics of National Park Visits
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2019-09-17 release on National Park Visits — 21,560 rows after cleaning and merge. Which parks draw the crowds — and how did visitation trend?

item.title: NETFLIX ENGAGEMENT: The Artometrics of Netflix Engagement
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2025-07-29 release on Netflix Engagement — 27,803 rows after cleaning and merge. Which titles consumed the most hours — the metric Netflix actually...

item.title: NETFLIX TITLES: The Artometrics of Netflix Titles
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2021-04-20 release on Netflix Titles — 7,787 rows after cleaning and merge. How did Netflix's catalog mix shift between films and series?

item.title: NUCLEAR EXPLOSIONS: The Artometrics of Nuclear Explosions
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2019-08-20 release on Nuclear Explosions — 2,051 rows after cleaning and merge. How did test yields and purposes shift through the nuclear age?

item.title: NYC RESTAURANT INSPECTIONS: The Artometrics of NYC Restaurant Inspections
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2018-12-11 release on NYC Restaurant Inspections — 100,000 rows after cleaning and merge. Which cuisines score highest — and how grades distribute?

item.title: PIXAR: The Artometrics of the Computer-Animation Canon
item.description: Pixar's 27-film canon in data: runtime creep, critic scores, audience grades, and where Cars and Lightyear broke the streak.

item.title: PROJECT GUTENBERG: The Artometrics of Project Gutenberg
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2025-06-03 release on Project Gutenberg — 100,000 rows after cleaning and merge. Which subjects dominate the public-domain canon?

item.title: RADIO STATIONS: The Artometrics of Radio Stations
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2022-11-08 release on Radio Stations — 17,186 rows after cleaning and merge. How do radio formats map across the dial?

item.title: RAMEN RATINGS: The Artometrics of Ramen Ratings
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2019-06-04 release on Ramen Ratings — 3,180 rows after cleaning and merge. Which ramen brands earn the stars — and where do they come from?

item.title: ROLLING STONE ALBUM RANKINGS: The Artometrics of Rolling Stone Album Rankings
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2024-05-07 release on Rolling Stone Album Rankings — 691 rows after cleaning and merge. Which albums sit at the canonical peak of Rolling Stone's...

item.title: ROMAN EMPERORS: The Artometrics of Roman Emperors
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2019-08-13 release on Roman Emperors — 68 rows after cleaning and merge. Who ruled longest — and did dynasty predict tenure?

item.title: SCHOOL DIVERSITY: The Artometrics of School Diversity
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2019-09-24 release on School Diversity — 27,944 rows after cleaning and merge. Where is student-body diversity highest — and how spread out are schools?

item.title: SHERLOCK HOLMES: The Artometrics of Sherlock Holmes
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2025-11-18 release on Sherlock Holmes — 65,958 rows after cleaning and merge. How is word count distributed across the Holmes canon?

item.title: SIMPSONS GUEST STARS: The Artometrics of Simpsons Guest Stars
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2019-08-27 release on Simpsons Guest Stars — 1,381 rows after cleaning and merge. Who guest-starred most often — and did celebrity density cluster in...

item.title: SUPER BOWL ADS: The Artometrics of Super Bowl Ads
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2021-03-02 release on Super Bowl Ads — 247 rows after cleaning and merge. Which Super Bowl spots won the post-game internet?

item.title: TV GOLDEN AGE: The Artometrics of TV Golden Age
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2019-01-08 release on TV Golden Age — 2,266 rows after cleaning and merge. When did prestige TV peak — and did critics agree with audiences?

item.title: UK MUSEUMS: The Artometrics of UK Museums
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2022-11-22 release on UK Museums — 4,191 rows after cleaning and merge. Which UK museums sit in which deprivation bands — and how are they distributed?

item.title: UN VOTES: The Artometrics of UN Votes
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2021-03-23 release on UN Votes — 100,000 rows after cleaning and merge. Which UN votes split the chamber — and who dissented most?

item.title: US PHDS AWARDED: The Artometrics of US PhDs Awarded
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2019-02-19 release on US PhDs Awarded — 3,370 rows after cleaning and merge. Which PhD fields expanded fastest — and where is production concentrated?

item.title: US TUITION COSTS: The Artometrics of US Tuition Costs
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2018-04-02 release on US Tuition Costs — 600 rows after cleaning and merge. How far did average tuition climb — and which states lead the bill?

item.title: US VOTER TURNOUT: The Artometrics of US Voter Turnout
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2018-10-09 release on US Voter Turnout — 936 rows after cleaning and merge. Which states show up — and how did turnout move across elections?

item.title: VIDEO GAMES: The Artometrics of Video Games
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2021-03-16 release on Video Games — 83,631 rows after cleaning and merge. Did critical acclaim correlate with commercial success in this slice of...

item.title: VIDEO GAMES STEAM SPY: The Artometrics of Video Games Steam Spy
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2019-07-30 release on Video Games Steam Spy — 26,688 rows after cleaning and merge. Which Steam titles earned the most playtime per dollar?

item.title: WEALTH AND INCOME: The Artometrics of Wealth and Income
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2021-02-09 release on Wealth and Income — 2,916 rows after cleaning and merge. How concentrated is wealth at the top of the distribution?

item.title: WEB PAGE METRICS: The Artometrics of Web Page Metrics
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2022-11-15 release on Web Page Metrics — 238 rows after cleaning and merge. Which pages load fastest — and what metrics move together?

item.title: WINE RATINGS: The Artometrics of Wine Ratings
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2019-05-28 release on Wine Ratings — 100,000 rows after cleaning and merge. Does price predict points — or do bargains cluster?

item.title: WORLD HERITAGE SITES: The Artometrics of World Heritage Sites
item.description: This report analyzes the TidyTuesday 2024-02-06 release on World Heritage Sites — 6 rows after cleaning and merge. How did UNESCO site counts grow across Scandinavia between 2004 and 2022?

item.title: POKEMON: The Artometrics of the World's Biggest Franchise
item.description: Pokémon is the highest-grossing media franchise in history — more than $150 billion in lifetime revenue across games, cards, merchandise, and film. That number gets cited constantly. What gets cite...

item.title: READMITTED: How America's Hospitals Are Failing the 30-Day Standard
item.description: 11,720 hospital-condition pairs under CMS HRRP: which states, conditions, and ownership types still exceed the 30-day readmission benchmark — and what that means for TEAM in 2026

item.title: CAESAR: The Psychonomics of the Great Dictator
item.description: Economics comes from the Greek oikonomia — the management of the house. Psychonomics asks the prior question: who is managing the soul of the house, and what does their inner architecture cost ever...

item.title: GIANT: The Artometrics of A San Francisco Dynasty
item.description: The San Francisco Giants have been playing professional baseball since 1883. That is not a typo. The franchise that now calls Oracle Park home started as the New York Gothams — a team that predates...

item.title: WARRIOR: The Artometrics of A Golden State Dynasty
item.description: The Golden State Warriors have played 78 seasons of professional basketball. For roughly 35 of them, they were irrelevant. Not rebuilding, not transitioning — just losing, year after year, in a market...

item.title: COFFEE: The Artometrics of Java
item.description: Coffee is the world's second-largest traded commodity by value, behind only crude oil. More than 125 million people depend on it for their livelihoods. Around 2.25 billion cups are consumed every d...

item.title: H3: The Artometrics of A YouTube Dynasty
item.description: H3 is not one channel — it is a network. Since 2011, Ethan and Hila Klein have built four YouTube channels, one clothing brand, a podcast empire, and one of the most documented creator controversie...

item.title: IMPERIAL: The Evolution of Empire
item.description: Every empire in history has told the same story about itself: we brought order, we built roads, we made the trains run on time. What the chronicles leave out is the spreadsheet. Who actually got ri...

item.title: FRANCHISE: The Artometrics of Media Monopolies
item.description: A data analysis of 107 franchises mapping how the most valuable IP in history — from Pokémon to Star Wars — actually makes its money.

item.title: ANIME: The Artometrics of Japanese Animation
item.description: 13,631 Titles. A Century Of Data. One Question: What Does The MyAnimeList Archive Actually Tell Us About How Anime Works As An Industry?
